description: Phase 007 of 118 FULL ISOLATE + NO MCP arc. Splits vitest tests by responsibility: moves unit tests for relocated deep-loop / coverage-graph lib code from system-spec-kit/mcp_server/tests/ into deep-loop-runtime/tests/{unit,integration}/, deletes MCP-handler tests for the 4 removed deep_loop_graph_* tools, creates 4 new direct-invocation integration tests (one per .cjs script: convergence/upsert/query/status) using a shared spawn-cjs helper, and adds a DB lifecycle test verifying clean open/close + sequential-write isolation. Depends on phase 006 (collateral updates landed; system stable enough to run a full vitest sweep). P0 gates: pnpm vitest run exit 0 and zero orphan imports of removed code paths.
